message:
feat(parser): add PEP 634 match/case, PEP 695 type params, subscript for-targets

- Add match/case statement parsing with proper soft keyword detection
- Add type parameter support for classes and functions: class C[T], def f[T]()
- Add type alias parsing: type X = SomeType
- Support subscript expressions as for-loop targets: for arr[i] in items
- Add **kwargs and *args support in class bases: class A(**d)
- Support single-line functions with docstrings: def f(): """doc"""
